name: agent-theme/usp-simple
title: USP Simple

default.title: Top Certifications
default.description: Our facilities have earned top manufacturing certifications for safety, quality and management.

default.description: We conduct quality tests at every stage of the production and manufacturing process to ensure quality and potency.

default.title: Converting CO<sub>2</sub> to Oxygen
default.description: Forever's more than 50 million aloe vera plants will cleanse the Earth of tons of CO<sub>2</sub> over our lifetime.
